subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! Upon thee be the peace of God and His grace! Thy letters have each attained unto the honor of being seen and heard. Praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک سلام الله و فضله نامهای تو هر یک بمشاهده و اصغا فائز لله الحمد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
